narrative:
Precinct Stonecreek/Jeff Twp (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 628 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.2 percentage points.
